backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor implementing user registration, authentication, profile management, and maintenance mode with role-based access control using AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old user records (with username field) to new user records (password only) when upgrading the canister.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the frontend registration flow fix (Registration.tsx and useQueries.ts) to test requirement REQ-2 with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering components, hooks, pages, utilities, and configuration files for the Minecraft-themed portfolio app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens (colors, borders, sidebar, charts).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app titled 'Kavyam Mistry Portfolio' that mounts the React root and loads main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root App component wrapping the portfolio in AuthProvider and CustomAuthWrapper, composing all portfolio sections (ProfileHeader, ContactIcons, AboutMe, Experience, Skills, Availability, Footer).
frontend/src/components/AboutMeSection.t: Renders the About Me section in a Minecraft-styled box displaying a developer bio with 3.5+ years experience and freelance availability notice.
frontend/src/components/AvailabilitySect: Displays a Minecraft-themed availability section advertising openness to freelance and paid development or moderator positions.
frontend/src/components/BackupControl.ts: UI component providing create, download, and restore backup buttons with confirmation dialog, using localStorage-based backup utilities.
frontend/src/components/ContactIcons.tsx: Renders email and YouTube contact icon links in Minecraft-styled boxes.
frontend/src/components/CustomAuthWrappe: Authentication wrapper that routes unauthenticated users to Login or Registration views, authenticated owners to the Owner page, and visitors to the portfolio with maintenance mode checking.
frontend/src/components/ExperienceSectio: Renders a Minecraft-themed section listing server experience entries (Obsidian MC, Snow MC, King MC, Cursed SMP) with roles displayed as badges.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Displays a site footer with copyright year, owner name, and a referral link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/MaintenanceScree: Full-screen Minecraft-themed maintenance page shown when the site is under maintenance, with decorative pixel blocks.
frontend/src/components/ProfileHeader.ts: Renders the portfolio header with the owner's name (Kavyam Mistry), Minecraft IGN, and Discord handle in a Minecraft-styled layout.
frontend/src/components/SkillsSection.ts: Displays a Minecraft-themed skills section organized into four categories (plugin config, server setup, permissions, platform support) with badge-style skill tags.
frontend/src/context/AuthContext.tsx: Provides a React context for session-based authentication, storing user role and username in sessionStorage with login/logout actions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with the user's Internet Identity or anonymously, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Simple hook that exposes the AuthContext value for consuming authentication state and actions.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity login, logout, and identity state via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for backend operations: fetching/toggling maintenance mode, registering users, and authenticating users via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/components/utilities, CSS custom properties for theming, and Minecraft-styled component classes (boxes, badges, title boxes).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page component that authenticates users against a hardcoded owner account or the backend API, assigning 'owner' or 'visitor' roles accordingly.
frontend/src/pages/Owner.tsx: Owner dashboard page providing controls for toggling maintenance mode and managing local backups (create, restore, download).
frontend/src/pages/Registration.tsx: Registration page component that validates input and calls the backend API to create a new user account, then redirects to login on success.
frontend/src/utils/backup.ts: Utility module for creating, restoring, inspecting, and downloading a hardcoded portfolio state backup stored in localStorage as JSON.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch variables), border radii, box shadows, and enabling dark mode, typography, container queries, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state including known issues (broken user registration), existing features, architectural notes, and a pending fix request (AR-1) to repair the backend Motoko registerUser logic.
